name: hotl
description: Structured guardrails for AI coding: brainstorm, plan, execute, review, and verify.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, execute, review, and verify AI-generated code changes.
interface.longDescription: HOTL adds structure to AI coding work. Use it to clarify intent, generate a workflow plan, execute with verification, review the result, and prove the change is ready before it lands on main. Includes skills for brainstorming, plan execution, PR review, code review, and final verification.
defaultPrompt: Design and plan this feature before coding
